Here's how to turn your views into leads:

22 engagement farming hacks for TikTok/ Reels

8/22 -  Self-categorization

This works 2 ways: comments and shares.

By tapping into self-identification, people jump in the comments to say what fits them and naturally send it to friends.

9/22 - Share an exclusive, not available feature

Show a feature that needs a code without ever actually giving it away.

Viewers get impatient and fill the comments asking for it.

This trick only works if the app is already popular in the target community.
